html:
Exclusive to:

The Piratihatitator is the replacement for the Prestihatitator in the Shipwrecked DLC. The Piratihatitator requires a Science Machine to prototype, and costs 1 Parrot, 4 Boards, and 1 Pirate Hat to craft.

Using the Piratihatitator to prototype an item has a 10% chance to spawn a Parrot Pirate and a Dubloon.

Contents

  • 1 Crafting Recipes
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Crafting Recipes

  • Meat Effigy
  • Shadow Manipulator
  • Pan Flute
  • One-man Band
  • Night Light
  • Life Giving Amulet
  • Chilled Amulet
  • Ice Staff
  • Nightmare Fuel
  • Purple Gem
  • Sleepytime Stories
  • Joy of Volcanology
  • Dripple Pipes

Tips

  • The Piratihatitator can be destroyed when the player has a Shadow Manipulator available for placement to save resources used to build it.

Trivia

  • The Piratihatitator shares its burnt model with the Prestihatitator.

Gallery

  • A burnt Piratihatitator.
Craftable ItemsStructures

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Piratihatitator
"Make your pirate hat... magic!"
Object Info
Perk
Unlock additional crafting recipes.
Crafting
×1 ×4 ×1
Tab
Tier
Miscellaneous
"piratihatitator"
“It's twisting my tongue.”
–Wilson
“Cursed pirate magic?”
–Willow
“Strange contraption.”
–Wolfgang
“This is but a step from madness.”
–Wendy
“A BAD GATEWAY TO UN-SCIENTIFIC EXPERIMENTATION”
–WX-78
“It's a research machine, fueled by the nautical sciences.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a funny lookin' contraption.”
–Woodie
“Such a fascinating device.”
–Maxwell
“The schematics in this machine could revolutionize the world!”
–Wagstaff
“This cöntraptiön has the smell öf Löki aböut it...”
–Wigfrid
“With this pirate hat we'll harness dark, cursed stuff.”
–Webber
“It holds many sea-crets.”
–Walani
“This reminds me of something...”
–Warly
“She looks great in thet hat.”
–Woodlegs
“DOTH MAKETH MAGICS”
–Wilba
“Makes the Yo Ho magic”
–Wormwood
“It pillages the magical knowledge.”
–Wheeler
The Piratihatitator is the replacement for the Prestihatitator in the Shipwrecked DLC. The Piratihatitator requires a Science Machine to prototype, and costs 1 Parrot, 4 Boards, and 1 Pirate Hat to craft.
Using the Piratihatitator to prototype an item has a 10% chance to spawn a Parrot Pirate and a Dubloon.

4 Gallery

The Piratihatitator shares its burnt model with the Prestihatitator.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Hải Tặc là sự thay thế cho Mũ Cao Thủ trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Mũ Hải Tặc yêu cầu Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu và tốn 1 Con Vẹt, 4 Ván Cờ và 1 Mũ Cướp Biển để chế tạo.
title: Piratihatitator
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Shipwrecked}} {{Object Infobox |image = File:Piratihatitator Build.png |icon=Piratihatitator.png |ingredient1 = Parrot |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Boards |multiplier2 = 4 |ingredient3 = Pirate Hat |multiplier3 = 1 |tab = Magic |tier = 1 |perk = Unlock additional crafting recipes. |spawnCode = "piratihatitator" |description = Make your pirate hat... magic! }} {{Quotes |wilson = It's twisting my tongue. |willow = Cursed pirate magic? |wolfgang = Strange contraption. |wendy = This is but a step from madness. |wx78 = A BAD GATEWAY TO UN-SCIENTIFIC EXPERIMENTATION |wickerbottom = It's a research machine, fueled by the nautical sciences. |woodie = That's a funny lookin' contraption. |maxwell = Such a fascinating device. |wagstaff = The schematics in this machine could revolutionize the world! |wigfrid = This cöntraptiön has the smell öf Löki aböut it... |webber = With this pirate hat we'll harness dark, cursed stuff. |walani = It holds many sea-crets. |warly = This reminds me of something... |woodlegs = She looks great in thet hat. |wilba = DOTH MAKETH MAGICS |wormwood = Makes the Yo Ho magic |wheeler = It pillages the magical knowledge. |choose = wx78}} The '''Piratihatitator''' is the replacement for the [[Prestihatitator]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. The Piratihatitator requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and costs 1 [[Parrot]], 4 [[Boards]], and 1 [[Pirate Hat]] to craft. Using the Piratihatitator to prototype an item has a 10% chance to spawn a [[Parrot Pirate]] and a [[Dubloons|Dubloon]]. == {{pic|32|Science Machine}} Crafting Recipes ==
